store.subtitle: Manage store details and images shown to customers.
store.empty_benefits: There are no active benefits at the moment.

noti.desc_list: Manage and send new notices, benefits, and event alerts.
noti.desc_form:
Register alerts to send to your service facility customers.
Please check again before saving as sent alerts cannot be canceled.
noti.desc_readonly: This alert cannot be edited because it has already been sent or is within 12 hours of the scheduled time.
noti.hint_division: ※ Please select one from Benefit, Notice, or Urgent.
noti.hint_date1: ※ If set to today, it will be processed immediately upon registration.
noti.hint_date2: ※ Except for urgent alerts, delivery times may vary based on user settings (nighttime ad consent).
noti.hint_image: ※ Image to be included. If not selected, no image will be displayed.
noti.hint_push: ※ Notifications will be sent to the selected targets immediately upon registration.
noti.premium_alert:
Insufficient notification balance.
This is a premium option.
Would you like to subscribe to the service?
noti.msg_require_title_length: Title must be at least 2 characters.
noti.msg_require_message_length: Message must be at least 20 characters.
noti.msg_require_push: Please select at least one notification target.
noti.msg_date_past: Send date cannot be in the past. Must be at least {{minDate}}.
noti.msg_date_expiry: The send date cannot exceed the expiration date ({{expiry}}).
noti.hint_image_ratio: ※ The recommended ratio is 16:9. Images that are too wide or tall may not be fully displayed.
noti.msg_confirm_save:
The sender is responsible for the sent content.
Please check once more before sending.
noti.desc_check_quantity:
Your remaining balance might be insufficient.
Please enter the estimated send quantity.
(Remaining: {{available}})
